afternoon: A cart slows as it passes you. The driver gives a wave.
dawn: You pass an early riser walking their dog along the road.
dusk: A figure walks ahead of you in the fading light, then turns off down a lane.
midday: You spot someone on the road ahead, driving a cart at a lazy pace.
midnight: An owl hoots from a nearby tree, breaking the silence.
morning: A farmer nods to you from the far side of a gate as you pass.
night: You hear footsteps on the road behind you, but when you turn, no one is there.
